title: Imagine
meaning_summary: Imagine still earns at a high level because it remains one of the most culturally reusable songs in modern popular music.
revenue_drivers: Global recognition keeps the song active in streaming and recurrent listening.
Event-driven use, memorial contexts, and social sharing refresh demand repeatedly.
Writer-led publishing value makes the song economically stronger than a performance-only catalog cut.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes unusually strong publishing-side economics and recurring global event-based listening.

ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and estate-side publishing participation assumed
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No new catalog sale adjustment assumed
ownership.notes: Imagine behaves more like a global standard than a normal legacy-rock song.
